stories: As a Customer, I want to be able to view only my own order details, so that I can keep my purchase history private.
As a User, I want ignorance, so that I dont have to deal with my incompetence.
As a User <Role>, I want website to have a Darkmode <Goal>, so that I can also work at night <Benefit>.
As a Player, I want the game to have local cooperative multiplayer support, so that i can play with my friends on the couch.
As a, I want a user-friendly UI, so that navigating through the Application is easy for the customer.
As a american, I want Obama, so we can get free healthcare.
